SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement (the "SHA") is made on this 15th day of November, 2023, by and among the following parties:

1. Dr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC: S2345678B), residing at 123 Orchard Lane, Singapore 567890, with contact number +65 9123 4567 and email address dr.tanwm@samplemail.sg.

2. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC: S3456789C), residing at 456 Clementi Ave, Singapore 123456, with contact number +65 9876 5432 and email address aishah.abdullah@fakemail.sg.

3. Ramasamy Muthu (NRIC: S4567890D), residing at 789 Jurong West St, Singapore 654321, with contact number +65 9654 3210 and email address ramasamy.muthu@synthetic.sg.

AND

Acme Innovations Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 202312345H), with its registered office at 101 Bukit Timah Rd, Singapore 678910.

WHEREAS, the parties have agreed to enter into this SHA to formalize their understanding regarding the management and operation of Acme Innovations Pte. Ltd. The total investment amount shall be SGD 500,000.

The parties agree that this SHA is not intended to address any project plan or project status related to other business activities outside the scope of Acme Innovations.

For further clarity, visit the secured site at https://example.sg/user/S2345678B.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this SHA as of the date first above written.
